name: Gemini Omni Flash Preview
description: Gemini Omni Flash Preview is a prepared catalog entry for Google's expected fast Gemini Omni preview model. Google announced Gemini Omni at I/O 2026, but this specific API model ID remains unconfirmed until it appears in official provider model lists.

details.name: source_status
details.value: Prepared from leak signal; awaiting official Google AI Studio or Vertex model ID confirmation.
